channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Inside US' 'Operation Hard Ball' Against Lawrence Bishnoi, India-Based Gangs

media:content.media:description: Lawrence Bishnoi (L) and his associate-turned-rival Jaggu Bhagwanpuria (R)

item.description: US investigators claimed Bishnoi projected himself as a "patriot," "nationalist," and "deeply religious" individual through social media and media interviews.
item.content:encoded: US investigators claimed Bishnoi projected himself as a "patriot," "nationalist," and "deeply religious" individual through social media and media interviews.

item.title: Opinion: Opinion | Why Many In PoK Are Now Asking India To 'Intervene' Against Pakistan
item.description: The lie of Azad Kashmir' is fast catching up with Pakistan. But it might just use it to push India into a tough spot.
item.content:encoded: The lie of Azad Kashmir' is fast catching up with Pakistan. But it might just use it to push India into a tough spot.

item.title: Chinese Men Used Telegram To Share Rape Videos, Drugging Tips In Germany

media:content.media:description: Defendant covers his face as he arrives for a trial against a network of Chinese men in Germany (File)

item.description: "The perpetrators were characterised by a particular ruthlessness, an objectification of the victims, and the perfidious planning of their crimes," Frankfurt chief prosecutor Dominik Mies says.
item.content:encoded: "The perpetrators were characterised by a particular ruthlessness, an objectification of the victims, and the perfidious planning of their crimes," Frankfurt chief prosecutor Dominik Mies says.

item.title: US Court Relief For Indian-Origin Doctor Who Drove Family In Tesla Off Cliff

media:content.media:description: Dharmesh Patel (45) was charged with three counts of attempted murder.

item.description: On January 2, 2023, Patel was on a road trip with his wife and two children when he drove his white Tesla off a cliff in Northern California.
item.content:encoded: On January 2, 2023, Patel was on a road trip with his wife and two children when he drove his white Tesla off a cliff in Northern California.

item.title: China Weighs Curbs On Overseas Access To Advanced AI Models: Report

media:content.media:description: Companies present at the talks included tech giants Alibaba and ByteDance as well as startup Z.ai

item.description: Beijing's potential restrictions on frontier AI models threaten global tech markets with higher costs while treating advanced software as a critical asset.
item.content:encoded: Beijing's potential restrictions on frontier AI models threaten global tech markets with higher costs while treating advanced software as a critical asset.

item.title: Global AI Firms Lag On Safety Measures, Report Warns

media:content.media:description: No company received an "A" in any single category, while Anthropic got the best overall score of "C+"

item.description: Seven researchers and governance experts determined the rankings based on public data and information provided by the companies.
item.content:encoded: Seven researchers and governance experts determined the rankings based on public data and information provided by the companies.

item.title: Lost To History No More: 9,909 Indian First World War Soldiers Honoured

media:content.media:description: 9,909 forgotten Indian WWI soldiers finally get official recognition

item.description: 9,909 Indian soldiers who died in WWI, long missing from official records, have been formally commemorated after a five-year research project
item.content:encoded: 9,909 Indian soldiers who died in WWI, long missing from official records, have been formally commemorated after a five-year research project

item.title: US Launches "Series Of Powerful Strikes" On Iran After Hormuz Attacks

media:content.media:description: The renewed fighting is likely to complicate ongoing talks.

item.description: The strikes came just hours after the three tankers were hit by projectiles while sailing through the Strait of Hormuz.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1124193/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>The strikes came just hours after the three tankers were hit by projectiles while sailing through the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: NATO Unveils Billions In Arms Deals As Trump Insists US Control Of Greenland

media:content.media:description: Trump called the semiautonomous island "an important part" for US

item.description: Trump demanded Greenland and lifted Turkey sanctions at a NATO summit showcasing $170B in arms deals, unsettling European and Israeli allies.
item.content:encoded: Trump demanded Greenland and lifted Turkey sanctions at a NATO summit showcasing $170B in arms deals, unsettling European and Israeli allies.

item.title: How A 3-Storey Building Survived Venezuela's Devastating Earthquakes

media:content.media:description: In a block of flats reduced to ruins in Venezuela, a modest three-storey building still stands

item.description: La Guaira, a popular tourist resort with azure Caribbean waters located about 40 kilometers from Caracas, took the brunt of the fury unleashed by the back-to-back 7.2 and 7.5 magnitude quakes.
item.content:encoded: La Guaira, a popular tourist resort with azure Caribbean waters located about 40 kilometers from Caracas, took the brunt of the fury unleashed by the back-to-back 7.2 and 7.5 magnitude quakes.

item.title: '80 Targets, 4-5 Times Bigger Attack': US On New Iran Strikes, Tehran Responds

media:content.media:description: Smoke rises from a fire after an explosion in Bandar Abbas

item.description: A US official told the Associated Press that attacks would likely last for hours and that they intend to hit around eight times more targets than the previous round of retaliatory strikes that were conducted at the end of June.
item.content:encoded: A US official told the Associated Press that attacks would likely last for hours and that they intend to hit around eight times more targets than the previous round of retaliatory strikes that were conducted at the end of June.

item.title: 15-Year-Old Arrested In Japan For Using ChatGPT To Delete 46,000 Anime Accounts

media:content.media:description: Investigators believe the teenager identified a security flaw in the platform.

item.description: Investigators claim he used ChatGPT to assist in writing a program that automated unauthorised access to member accounts, resulting in the cancellation of 46,812 subscriptions.
item.content:encoded: Investigators claim he used ChatGPT to assist in writing a program that automated unauthorised access to member accounts, resulting in the cancellation of 46,812 subscriptions.

item.title: US-Iran War Live Updates: US Launches Fresh Strikes Against Iran, Revokes Waiver After Hormuz Attacks

media:content.media:description: The US also revoked a sanctions waiver for Iranian oil.

item.description: Iran War: The United States launched "power strikes" against Iran following a series of attacks by Tehran on commercial ships near the Strait of Hormuz.
item.content:encoded: Iran War: The United States launched "power strikes" against Iran following a series of attacks by Tehran on commercial ships near the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Musk No Longer A Trillionaire: What Went Wrong With SpaceX IPO

media:content.media:description: Most of Musk's fortune comes from his ownership in SpaceX.

item.description: Musk's fortune dropped below the trillion-dollar mark once again, fluctuating around $992-$997 billion depending on the wealth tracker.
item.content:encoded: Musk's fortune dropped below the trillion-dollar mark once again, fluctuating around $992-$997 billion depending on the wealth tracker.

item.title: Mexican Man Shot Dead By ICE Agent After Allegedly Trying To Run Over Officer

media:content.media:description: The man shot to death was identified as Lorenzo Salgado Araujo, described by ICE as a Mexican national.

item.description: A US Immigration and Customs Enforcement agent fatally shot a motorist in Houston on Tuesday while officers were trying to stop the man's vehicle, the agency said in a statement, in the midst of an escalating federal crackdown on migrants.
item.content:encoded: A US Immigration and Customs Enforcement agent fatally shot a motorist in Houston on Tuesday while officers were trying to stop the man's vehicle, the agency said in a statement, in the midst of an escalating federal crackdown on migrants.

item.title: Boeing 737 Cargo Plane With 5 On Board Goes Missing Off Pak's Karachi Coast

media:content.media:description: The authority said in a post on X that search-and-rescue operations were under way in the Arabian Sea.

item.description: The Boeing 737 was being operated by Karachi-based K2 Airways on a cargo flight from Sharjah in the UAE to Karachi when it reported a navigation system problem at 9:18 p.m. local time
item.content:encoded: The Boeing 737 was being operated by Karachi-based K2 Airways on a cargo flight from Sharjah in the UAE to Karachi when it reported a navigation system problem at 9:18 p.m. local time

item.title: FBI Offers $50,000 Reward For 'Most Wanted' Gangster Goldy Brar

media:content.media:description: Goldy Brar is based in the United States and is the alleged leader of the Group in North America.

item.description: FBI offers $50,000 reward for Goldy Brar wanted for crime group involvement
item.content:encoded: FBI offers $50,000 reward for Goldy Brar wanted for crime group involvement

item.title: Global Crackdown On Lawrence Bishnoi Gang: 24 Arrested, Assassination Plot Busted

media:content.media:description: One of the most serious allegations centers on the Bishnoi criminal enterprise, led by Lawrence Bishnoi.

item.description: According to federal prosecutors, Bishnoi allegedly directed an international criminal network from inside prison using contraband mobile phones and encrypted internet communication devices.
item.content:encoded: According to federal prosecutors, Bishnoi allegedly directed an international criminal network from inside prison using contraband mobile phones and encrypted internet communication devices.

item.title: On Camera, Israeli Officer Tosses Stun Grenade Into Car Carrying Palestinians

media:content.media:description: In the footage, the officer walks up to the car and shouts at the people inside

item.description: The CCTV clip, recorded on Sunday and released by Israeli human rights group B'Tselem, shows an officer confronting a vehicle before the situation quickly escalates.
item.content:encoded: The CCTV clip, recorded on Sunday and released by Israeli human rights group B'Tselem, shows an officer confronting a vehicle before the situation quickly escalates.

item.title: Iran Warns Of "Decisive" Action After US Strikes Around Strait Of Hormuz

media:content.media:description: Iranian state media on Tuesday reported a series of explosions heard in the Strait of Hormuz region.

item.description: Iranian state media on Tuesday reported a series of explosions heard in the Strait of Hormuz region, moments after US officials announced "powerful" strikes on Iran.
item.content:encoded: Iranian state media on Tuesday reported a series of explosions heard in the Strait of Hormuz region, moments after US officials announced "powerful" strikes on Iran.
